name: Mepet Metro Petrol ve Tesisleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S.
summary: Mepet Metro Petrol ve Tesisleri Sanayi Ticaret A.S. owns and operates fuel stations and road rest facilities in Turkey. The company owns and operates 24 fuel stations that sell fuel and petroleum products. It also offers road recreational services to bus passengers, private vehicle passengers, and long-distance drivers; and other services in the tourism sector. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
